eras.title: Enterprise Foundation
eras.subtitle: Production-Grade Depth and Security
eras.description: Established enterprise-level foundation with comprehensive accessibility, error handling, security hardening, and production infrastructure. Added multi-tenant architecture, AI agents, and mobile optimization across all features.

changes.text: Added enterprise depth to all views with skeletons, error handling, accessibility, and validation
Implemented multi-tenant schema with organizations, team memberships, and RLS policies
Added n8n workflow definitions for scheduled data synchronization
Built contact enrichment pipeline with Clay MCP integration and AI research
Added deal scoring, follow-up automation, and pipeline forecasting features
Implemented document upload to Supabase Storage with drag-drop interface
Created learning dashboard with golden examples and pattern visualization
Added Overnight Agent workflow for autonomous Claude code execution
Optimized mobile experience with responsive breakpoints and touch targets
Hardened security with prompt injection protection and input validation
Added comprehensive test suite with 337 new API and executor tests
Integrated CodeQL, Semgrep, and SonarCloud for automated quality assurance
Refactored large components into smaller, maintainable modules

eras.title: Production Summit
eras.subtitle: Enterprise Launch Preparation Complete
eras.description: The expedition reached production readiness through systematic auditing and hardening. Mobile capabilities were established across all major routes, while sync reliability and monitoring systems were fortified for enterprise deployment.

changes.text: Migrated raw localStorage to centralized storage.js with comprehensive test coverage
Completed 4-phase production audit roadmap covering critical fixes, architecture improvements, hardening, and scale preparation
Implemented 5-phase mobile experience covering performance foundations, navigation, Task Manager views, consulting portal, and progressive enhancements
Built sync reliability foundation with auth-aware consulting, health recording, source tracking, and failure indicators
Added code quality dashboard with magic link authentication and restricted public signup
Implemented password recovery flow with dedicated update interface
Added comprehensive LLM call logging for all Claude API interactions
Built provider abstraction layer in anthropic client architecture
Enhanced financial widget with Monarch sync status indicators
Added manual sync capability to consulting portal interface
Resolved enterprise authentication errors, client detail wiring, and task empty states
Fixed sync source key mismatches, threshold handling, and error recovery
Updated design system for accessibility compliance and specification alignment
Applied frontend design polish addressing 5 items from competitive analysis
Adjusted task processing schedule to daily execution for Hobby plan compliance
